name.zh: 远程资源包含边界集合

description.zh: 审校远程 HTTP 资源是否被服务端 include/require 路径获取并作为模板或代码处理；原集合按 HTTP 规范化、工具夹具和退休内容拆分。
description.en: Reviews whether a remote HTTP resource is fetched through a server-side include or require path and processed as template or code, splitting the source into HTTP normalization, tool fixtures, and retired content.

prerequisites.zh: 目标服务端语言和配置允许远程 URL 进入 include/require 类 Sink；仅 URL 出现在响应、客户端请求或普通 HTTP fetch 不构成 RFI。
prerequisites.en: The server language and configuration permit a remote URL to reach an include or require-style sink; a URL in a response, a client request, or an ordinary HTTP fetch does not constitute RFI.

prerequisites.zh: 准备只绑定 127.0.0.1 的短文本 marker 服务、单次请求、应用访问日志和模板/包含调用栈，不提供脚本代码。
prerequisites.en: Prepare a short-text marker service bound only to 127.0.0.1, one request, application access logs, and template or include call-stack evidence without serving script code.

overview.zh: RFI 的关键不是应用能请求 URL，而是远程响应进入服务端包含语义。安全验证只提供纯文本 marker，并分别证明网络获取、include Sink 和服务端解释阶段。
overview.en: RFI is not merely an application requesting a URL; the remote response must enter server-side inclusion semantics. Safe validation serves plain text only and proves network fetch, include sink, and server interpretation separately.

vulnerability.zh: 应用把用户控制的 URL 直接交给 include/require 或等价模板加载器，且运行时允许远程资源。远程内容因此跨越数据边界进入服务端解析上下文。
vulnerability.en: The application sends a user-controlled URL directly to include, require, or an equivalent template loader while the runtime permits remote resources, allowing remote content to cross into a server parsing context.

exploitation.zh: 先用不可解释的纯文本建立负对照，再提交单一回环 marker URL，关联 marker 服务首包、应用请求 ID、include 调用栈和渲染结果。大小写变体必须逐条测试，不能把 DNS、连接错误或普通代理请求当作包含。
exploitation.en: Establish a negative control with non-executable plain text, submit one loopback marker URL, and correlate the marker server's first packet, application request ID, include call stack, and render result. Test scheme-case variants individually and do not treat DNS, connection errors, or an ordinary proxy request as inclusion.

mitigation.zh: 禁止用户输入参与模板或文件路径，关闭不需要的远程包含能力，使用固定资源映射和 allowlist，并对 URL 规范化后再次授权。运行身份应限制网络和文件权限。
mitigation.en: Keep user input out of template and file paths, disable unnecessary remote-inclusion capability, use fixed resource mappings and allowlists, and reauthorize after URL normalization. Restrict network and filesystem permissions for the runtime identity.

description.zh: 记录运行时、配置、Sink 和纯文本负对照。
description.en: Record the runtime, configuration, sink, and plain-text negative control.

description.zh: 只使用执行区的回环资源并触发一次受控包含请求。
description.en: Use only the execution entry's loopback resource and trigger one controlled inclusion request.

description.zh: 将首包、请求 ID、调用栈和服务端结果绑定到同一轮。
description.en: Bind the first packet, request ID, call stack, and server result to the same run.

description.zh: 修复后本地模板保持可用，远程 URL 在网络访问前被拒绝。
description.en: After remediation local templates remain functional and remote URLs are rejected before network access.

analysis.zh: 阳性要求应用进程从回环 marker 服务获取当前 token，并由已识别 include/template Sink 消费；仅 HTTP 请求、URL 回显、错误、DNS 或客户端加载不是 RFI。
analysis.en: A positive requires the application process to fetch the current token from the loopback marker service and have the identified include or template sink consume it; an HTTP request, URL reflection, error, DNS event, or client load alone is not RFI.

opsecTips.zh: 只提供短纯文本 marker，出现脚本解释、子进程、外连、真实文件访问或 worker 异常时停止。
opsecTips.en: Serve short plain-text markers only and stop on script interpretation, child processes, egress, real-file access, or worker anomalies.

opsecTips.zh: 测试后停止回环服务、删除临时目录和日志，清空模板/URL 缓存并回归正常本地模板。
opsecTips.en: Stop the loopback service, delete temporary directories and logs, clear template and URL caches, and regress normal local templates afterward.

review.rationale: 原条目混合 HTTP RFI、外部脚本托管、反弹 Shell、data wrapper、无效双写 URL、scheme 大小写和 FTP/filter；仅保留纯文本 HTTP 解析边界，其余迁到工具或退休。
lineDisposition: execution 1 and execution 3 -> lfi-rfi-tools as local marker fixtures
execution 2, wafBypass 0, and wafBypass 2 -> retire with bilingual reasons
